name: Aircall Business Phone API
what_it_does: Aircall API for cloud business phone system designed for sales and support teams. Enables AI agents to access call logs, recordings, contacts, tags, and team analytics. Aircall integrates natively with Salesforce, HubSpot, and Zendesk — making it a popular choice for CRM-connected call centers.
use_cases: Querying call logs and recordings from customer support analytics agents
Retrieving call tags and disposition data from sales pipeline automation agents
Monitoring team performance metrics from call center reporting agents
Syncing Aircall call data with CRM systems from sales workflow agents
best_when: A sales or support team using Aircall wants AI agents to analyze call data, extract insights from recordings, and sync call information with CRM tools.
avoid_when: You need complex IVR or contact center routing — Aircall is simpler than enterprise contact center platforms. PRIVACY: Call recordings are sensitive customer interaction data.

auth.notes: Aircall API ID + token authentication. Tokens generated per application in Aircall dashboard. Separate credentials for production and sandbox.

pricing.notes: Aircall subscription required. API access included with all plans.

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Call recordings and transcripts contain sensitive customer conversations
No public MCP server — REST API or SDK integration required
Rate limits at 60 req/min — plan batch queries accordingly
Call recording access may require customer consent per jurisdiction
Webhook events should be used for real-time call data vs polling
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Business call recordings and customer interaction data. SOC2 and GDPR. Call recordings require consent per local laws. API key must be secured.

security_score_components.security_notes: Call recordings with customer conversations. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. Recording access requires legal consent per jurisdiction.
